prompt: A highly detailed anime fantasy portrait of a serene fox-eared young woman in left-facing side profile, shown from about thigh-up, centered slightly right of frame. She has long flowing silver-white with a soft pink tint at the ends hair, large white fox ears, pale skin, and one visible vivid blue eye. Her expression is calm, introspective, and luminous. She wears an elegant black kimono richly decorated with intricate gold and red floral patterns, with a traditional obi visible at the back. In her hair is an ornate kanzashi-style floral ornament made of red, gold, and black flowers with dangling gold chains and tassels. Behind her head is a large glowing circular celestial magic halo, formed by 3 concentric rings with fine arcane symbols, star-like points, and radiant golden lines, creating a sacred, mystical backlight. The background is a dark textured painterly space with dramatic black, bronze, and crimson brush textures, glowing embers, gold splashes, and scattered flowers near the lower left. Add 1 vertical line of Japanese calligraphy along the left side reading 夢は光のように、静かに心を照らす。, plus 1 small red seal stamp beneath it. Use cinematic rim lighting, intense golden glow, ultra-detailed fabric, delicate hair strands, sparkling particles, elegant Japanese fantasy atmosphere, premium illustration quality, masterpiece anime key visual, refined composition, dramatic contrast, and a polished painterly finish.
